params.name: bundles
params.description: Include bundle activation status in the health check.

params.name: plugins
params.description: Include plugin status in the health check.

params.name: exclude-plugin
params.description: Exclude specific plugins from the health check. Can be specified multiple times.

items.docs: Perform a health check to verify that the server is operational.

params.name: rule-name
params.description: Name of the rule to evaluate in the `system.health` package.

items.docs: Perform a custom health check using the policy at `data.system.health.<rule-name>`.
